raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tai Deenâ / kad tas
Dsihwokli uhszelts tappe/ ap-
kahje ta Padebbes to Dsihwokli
us to Leezibas Telti/ un Wakk-
râ bija pahr to Dsihwokli weens
Ugguns Gihmis lihds Rihtam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tä notikke tas bes Mit-
tefchanas/ ta Padebbes apkahje
to/ un Nakti bija weens Ugguns
Gihmis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pehz to/ kad ta Pa-
debbes uhszelta tappe no tahs
Telts/ tad zehlahs arridsan tee
Israëka Behrni/ un tai Weetâ /
fur ta Padebbes palikke/ turap-
mette tee Israëka Behrni to Leh-
geri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz ta KUNGA Wahrd-
du zehlahs tee Israëka Behrni/
un pehz ta KUNGA Wahrdü
apmettahs tee Israëka Behrni/
wiffäs Deenäs/ kamehr ta Pa-
debbes us to Dsihwokli palikke/
duffeja tee Lehgeri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad ta Padebbes daudf
Deenas uhs to Dsihwokli palik-
ke/ tad turreja tee Israëka Behr-
ni ta KUNGA Sargaschanu/
un ne zehlahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad ta Padebbes ne-
tik ilgam uhs to Dsihwokli pa-
likke: Pehz ta KUNGA Wahrd-
du tee apmettahs / un pehz ta
KUNGA Wahrdü tee zehlahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kad ta Padebbes ni
Wakkara lihds Rihtam stahweja,
un ta Padebbes Rihtä iszehlahs
tad zehlahs winnt / jeb tas Dee
nâ / jeb Nakti bija / kad ta Pa-
debbes uhszelta tappe / tad ir win-
ri zehlahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jeb ja ta Padebbes diw
Deenas/ jeb weenu Mehneti/ je-
dauds Deenas us to Dsihwok-
kawejahs / un us to palikke / tad
duffeja tee Israëka Behrni/ un na-
zehlahs / un kad ta iszehlahs/ tad
zehlahs ir winni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz ta KUNGA Wahrd-
du tee apmettahs / un pehz ta
KUNGA Wahrdü tee zehlahs /
tee turreja ta KUNGA Sarga-
schanu/ pehz ta KUNGA Wahrd-
du zaur Mohsu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta X. Nodalla.
Deewa Eikkumi ka tahs diwi sudraba Trummets-
jawalka: 1/2. Tee Eaudis zeffahs no Si-
nai ar to Padebbeju: 11. No eet us Pah-
ranu pehz jaweem. lihdsinateem Karrogeem:
12. Mohsus luhs Obabu / lai wiꞥsch lihd-
eet: 29. Mohsus luhschana pee to Lehger-
Zelschanas un Apmechanas: 3 r.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tas KUNGS run-
Vnaja us Mohsu/ un faz-
zija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Darri tew Trummets/ no-
zeeta Sudraba buhs teiw tahs
darriht/ un tahs laid irr par Sa-
funkchann tahs Draudses / un
par Zelfchanu to Lehgeru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad ar wiꞥxeemtohp trum-
metehts/ tad buhs wiffai Drau-
dsei pee tewis fapulzetees/preekfch
tahs Sa-eefchanas Telts Dur-
wim.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
